languages.original_text: "It's not often you see grateful crowds of invalids on the bridge of a voidship. Such behaviour is considered potentially dangerous in the Adeptus Arbites. I will increase the deck patrols based on this new data."

languages.text: "Не часто увидишь благодарные толпы калек на мостике пустотного корабля. Такое поведение в Адептус Арбитес считается потенциально опасным. Внесу усиление дозоров в связи с новыми данными".

"It's not often you see grateful crowds of invalids on the bridge of a voidship. Such behaviour is considered potentially dangerous in the Adeptus Arbites. I will increase the deck patrols based on this new data."
languages.original_text: "Не часто увидишь благодарные толпы калек на мостике пустотного корабля. Такое поведение в Адептус Арбитес считается потенциально опасным. Внесу усиление дозоров в связи с новыми данными".

"It's not often you see grateful crowds of invalids on the bridge of a voidship. Such behaviour is considered potentially dangerous in the Adeptus Arbites. I will increase the deck patrols based on this new data."

languages.text: 「空飛ぶ船のブリッジで、感謝の気持ちを表す病人たちの群れを見ることは稀です。このような行動は、アデプタ・アルビテスでは危険を伴うと見なされます。この新たなデータに基づき、デッキパトロールを増強します」
languages.original_text: "It's not often you see grateful crowds of invalids on the bridge of a voidship. Such behaviour is considered potentially dangerous in the Adeptus Arbites. I will increase the deck patrols based on this new data."

traits.locale_text: 「空飛ぶ船のブリッジで、感謝の気持ちを表す病人たちの群れを見ることは稀です。このような行動は、アデプタ・アルビテスでは危険を伴うと見なされます。この新たなデータに基づき、デッキパトロールを増強します。」

languages.text: « Il est rare de voir des invalides reconnaissants se masser sur la passerelle d'un vaisseau. L'Adeptus Arbites considère ce genre de rassemblement comme un danger potentiel. Je vais augmenter les patrouilles du pont sur la base de ces nouvelles données. »
languages.original_text: "It's not often you see grateful crowds of invalids on the bridge of a voidship. Such behaviour is considered potentially dangerous in the Adeptus Arbites. I will increase the deck patrols based on this new data."

traits.locale_text: « Il est rare de voir des invalides reconnaissants se masser sur la passerelle d'un vaisseau. L'Adeptus Arbites considère ce genre de rassemblement comme un danger potentiel. Je vais augmenter les patrouilles du pont sur la base de ces nouvelles données. »

languages.text: "Man sieht auf der Brücke eines Raumschiffs nicht oft Horden dankbarer Invaliden. Das Adeptus Arbites erachtet ein derartiges Verhalten als potenziell gefährlich. Ich werde die Patrouillen an Deck basierend auf diesen neuen Daten verstärken."
languages.original_text: "It's not often you see grateful crowds of invalids on the bridge of a voidship. Such behaviour is considered potentially dangerous in the Adeptus Arbites. I will increase the deck patrols based on this new data."

traits.locale_text: "Man sieht auf der Brücke eines Raumschiffs nicht oft Horden dankbarer Invaliden. Das Adeptus Arbites erachtet ein derartiges Verhalten als potenziell gefährlich. Ich werde die Patrouillen an Deck basierend auf diesen neuen Daten verstärken."

languages.text: "Bir uçsuz gemisinin köprüsünde minnettar engellileri görmek, sık rastlanan bir durum değil. Bu tür davranışlar Adeptus Arbites nezdinde potansiyel olarak tehlikeli kabul edilir. Bu yeni verilere dayanarak güverte devriyelerini artıracağım."
languages.original_text: "It's not often you see grateful crowds of invalids on the bridge of a voidship. Such behaviour is considered potentially dangerous in the Adeptus Arbites. I will increase the deck patrols based on this new data."

traits.locale_text: "Bir uçsuz gemisinin köprüsünde minnettar engellileri görmek, sık rastlanan bir durum değil. Bu tür davranışlar Adeptus Arbites nezdinde potansiyel olarak tehlikeli kabul edilir. Bu yeni verilere dayanarak güverte devriyelerini artıracağım."

languages.text: «No es habitual ver tantos inválidos agradecidos en el puente de una nave del vacío. En el Adeptus Arbites, tal actitud se considera un riesgo potencial. Reforzaré las patrullas de cubierta en base a esta nueva información».
languages.original_text: "It's not often you see grateful crowds of invalids on the bridge of a voidship. Such behaviour is considered potentially dangerous in the Adeptus Arbites. I will increase the deck patrols based on this new data."

traits.locale_text: «No es habitual ver tantos inválidos agradecidos en el puente de una nave del vacío. En el Adeptus Arbites, tal actitud se considera un riesgo potencial. Reforzaré las patrullas de cubierta en base a esta nueva información».

languages.text: “在虚空舰的舰桥上，心怀感激的伤病人群实属罕见。在法务部看来，此类行为具有潜在危险性。我将根据这项新数据，加强甲板巡逻力度。”
languages.original_text: "It's not often you see grateful crowds of invalids on the bridge of a voidship. Such behaviour is considered potentially dangerous in the Adeptus Arbites. I will increase the deck patrols based on this new data."

traits.locale_text: “在虚空舰的舰桥上，心怀感激的伤病人群实属罕见。在法务部看来，此类行为具有潜在危险性。我将根据这项新数据，加强甲板巡逻力度。”
